title: Delhi Technological University, TimesPro announce the inaugural Advanced Certificate Program in Artificial Intelligence
description: New Delhi [India], March 12: As artificial intelligence rapidly reshapes how organisations build products, manage risk, serve customers and run operations, the need for professionals who can design, deploy and govern intelligent systems has accelerated. Delhi Technological University (DTU, New Delhi), in collaboration with TimesPro, has announced the inaugural batch of the Advanced Certificate Programme in Artificial Intelligence, aimed at learners seeking strong conceptual grounding alongside practical, job-relevant capability.

title: Atlassian Cuts 1,600 Jobs As Company Shifts Focus To AI
description: Layoffs to affect 10% of workforce amid Australian company's restructuring plan to push into artificial intelligence and enterprise sales.
content:
Software company Atlassian has announced plans to cut about 10% of its global workforce, roughly 1,600 jobs. as it restructures operations and increases investment in artificial intelligence (AI), according to The Guardian.

title: Market Jitters: Middle East Tensions Shake China and Hong Kong Stocks
description: China and Hong Kong stocks dipped on Thursday amid heightened Middle East tensions impacting investor sentiment. While energy shares soared, sectors like non-ferrous metals and artificial intelligence saw declines. The geopolitical unrest led to broader market volatility, with analysts cautioning against significant oil price spikes without major disruptions.
content: China and Hong Kong stocks experienced a downturn on Thursday as investor caution intensified amid escalating tensions in the Middle East. The conflict involving the U.S., Israel, and Iran showed few signs of resolution, dragging down China's major s... [765 chars]

description: The U.S. technology giant is making a push for more Africans to adopt its artificial-intelligence tools in the world’s youngest and fastest-growing population.
content:

title: Academic Leaders and VCs Explore AI's Impact on Higher Education at I4IC 2026, Hosted by Employability.life and Federation University Australia
description: New Delhi [India], March 12: As Artificial Intelligence reshapes industries, economies, and societies at unprecedented speed, Vice Chancellors across India are proactively preparing their institutions for the future. At I4IC 2026, a high octane Senior Leadership Workshop brought together top academic decision-makers to deliberate on AI's transformative impact on higher education.

title: Zalando eyes higher 2026 profit as AI drives productivty
